name: Classic Smash Burger
description: Double smashed beef patty, American cheese, pickles, shredded lettuce, and bistro sauce on a brioche bun.

name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
description: Beef patty topped with sautéed cremini mushrooms, melted Swiss, and garlic aioli on a toasted sesame bun.

name: Spicy Crispy Chicken Burger
description: Buttermilk fried chicken breast, jalapeño slaw, pepper jack cheese, and chipotle mayo on a brioche bun.

name: Truffle Parmesan Fries
description: Hand-cut fries tossed in truffle oil and finished with shaved Parmesan and fresh parsley.

name: Onion Rings
description: Beer-battered thick-cut onion rings served with smoky ranch dipping sauce.

name: Side Salad
description: Mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, and choice of house or Caesar dressing.

name: Classic Lemonade
description: Fresh-squeezed lemonade with a hint of mint. Sweetened or unsweetened.

name: Craft Root Beer Float
description: House-made craft root beer topped with two scoops of vanilla bean ice cream.

name: Warm Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Molten dark chocolate cake served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream and raspberry coulis.

name: Bistro Banana Split
description: Fresh banana, three scoops of ice cream, hot fudge, caramel, whipped cream, and a cherry on top.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen
description: Rich, creamy pork bone broth with hand-pulled noodles, chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, nori, and green onions.

name: Chicken Katsu
description: Crispy panko-breaded chicken cutlet drizzled with tangy tonkatsu sauce and served over steamed white rice.

name: Gyoza
description: Pan-fried pork and cabbage dumplings with a golden crust, served with a savory soy-ginger dipping sauce.

name: Dragon Roll
description: Crispy shrimp tempura and cucumber roll topped with fresh avocado slices and a drizzle of spicy mayo.

name: Matcha Ice Cream
description: Velvety ceremonial-grade matcha ice cream with a subtle earthy sweetness, served with a dusting of green tea powder.

name: Miso Soup
description: Silky white miso broth with soft tofu, wakame seaweed, and a sprinkle of fresh scallions.

name: Chicken Souvlaki
description: Grilled marinated chicken skewers seasoned with lemon, garlic, and oregano, served with warm pita and tzatziki.

name: Spanakopita
description: Flaky phyllo pastry filled with a savory blend of spinach, feta, and fresh herbs, baked to golden perfection.

name: Greek Salad
description: Crisp romaine, ripe tomatoes, Kalamata olives, cucumber, and creamy feta tossed in a bright lemon-herb vinaigrette.

name: Baklava
description: Layers of buttery phyllo filled with spiced walnuts and pistachios, soaked in fragrant honey and rose water syrup.

name: Tzatziki Bowl
description: Thick Greek yogurt whipped with cucumber, fresh dill, and garlic, served with warm toasted pita wedges.

name: Lamb Gyros
description: Slow-roasted seasoned lamb shaved thin and wrapped in warm pita with tomato, onion, and creamy tzatziki.

name: Croque Monsieur
description: A classic French pressed sandwich of smoky ham and Gruyère layered between buttery bread, topped with golden béchamel.

name: Beef Bourguignon
description: Tender braised beef slow-cooked in Burgundy wine with pearl onions, mushrooms, and fresh thyme.

name: Crème Brûlée
description: Silky vanilla custard baked to perfection and finished with a paper-thin caramelized sugar crust torched tableside.

name: Croissant
description: Buttery, cloud-light layers of hand-laminated dough baked until shatteringly crisp outside and pillowy soft within.

name: French Onion Soup
description: Deeply caramelized onions in a rich beef broth, blanketed with a toasted baguette crouton and bubbling Gruyère.

name: Crêpes Suzette
description: Delicate crêpes folded in a warm Grand Marnier and orange butter sauce, finished with a dramatic tableside flambé.

name: Street Tacos
description: Three soft corn tortillas filled with seasoned carne asada, white onion, cilantro, and a squeeze of fresh lime.

name: Guacamole and Chips
description: Hand-mashed avocado with lime, jalapeño, cilantro, and red onion, served with a basket of warm house-made tortilla chips.

name: Churros
description: Crispy cinnamon-sugar fried dough sticks served piping hot alongside a rich dark chocolate dipping sauce.

name: Horchata
description: Chilled creamy rice milk sweetened with cinnamon and vanilla, a soothing and refreshing traditional Mexican staple.

name: Enchiladas
description: Corn tortillas stuffed with tender pulled chicken and smothered in smoky red chile sauce, topped with melted cotija and crema.

name: Elote
description: Grilled corn on the cob slathered in mayo, rolled in cotija cheese, dusted with chili powder, and finished with fresh lime.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken tikka simmered in a velvety tomato-cream sauce infused with aromatic spices, served with basmati rice.

name: Garlic Naan
description: Pillowy leavened flatbread baked in a tandoor oven, brushed generously with garlic butter and fresh cilantro.

name: Mango Lassi
description: A thick, refreshing blend of ripe Alphonso mango, chilled yogurt, and a pinch of cardamom — sweet and utterly calming.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Melt-in-your-mouth milk solid dumplings soaked in warm rose and cardamom syrup, served with a scoop of kulfi.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Cubes of fresh paneer nestled in a velvety spiced spinach sauce, brightened with ginger, garlic, and a touch of cream.

name: Biryani
description: Fragrant long-grain basmati rice layered with slow-cooked spiced lamb, caramelized onions, saffron, and fresh mint.
